name: Touhou Project: Genesis Zero
description: Welcome to the world of Touhou Project, now featuring a twist of the classic franchise in this bloody tale of war. Inspired by franchises like Bloodborne and Elder Scrolls, this action/adventure RPG brings you to the world of Gensokyo like never before, a land corrupted and infested with mythologically accurate depictions of the Youkai featured in Zun’s original games.
creator: TheEmerald1sle
